Description: Cannot equip gear to feet.
Name: Cosmosuit Bottoms

Description:
A banded chest containing a complete cosmosuit.

Required level: 1. IL: 1.
Name: Cosmosuit Coffer

Description:
Won't be moving mountains, but can handle pebbles with aplomb.

Use item to acquire the micro rover minion.
Name: Micro Rover

Description: An illustrated manual of how to effectively demonstrate disapproval of offensive comments without resorting to unbridled violence─which any lady knows is always the second resort, never the first. Use to learn the /rage emote.
Name: Ballroom Etiquette - Bearing Insult

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for an industrious explorer of the cosmos.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Cosmic Exploration Framer's Kit

Description: The sight of it alone enough to make a Loporrit hop with excitement, this ticket can be traded with Orbitingway for the chance to win valuable prizes.
Name: Big Bang Ticket

Description: A slanted desk suited for drawing up engineering designs.
Name: Drafting Table

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Reading Glasses</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Reading Glasses</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on reading aids of varying colors. Use to unlock the reading glasses facewear.
Name: The Faces We Wear - Reading Glasses

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Tinted Sunglasses</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Tinted Sunglasses</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on sunglasses in varying colors. Use to unlock the tinted sunglasses facewear.
Name: The Faces We Wear - Tinted Sunglasses

Description: This peculiar contraption creates illusions by weaving together myriad shades of light. Used by ambitious Loporrits for celebratory purposes.
Name: Magicked Prism (Cosmic Exploration)

Description: No matter your distance from the sun, this parasol will protect your skin and nurture your dreams. Use to acquire a Loparasol.
Name: Loparasol

Description: A labor-saving pink dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Neon Pink Dye

Description: A labor-saving orange dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Bright Orange Dye

Description: A labor-saving green dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Neon Green Dye

Description: A labor-saving yellow dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Neon Yellow Dye

Description: A labor-saving purple dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Violet Purple Dye

Description: A labor-saving blue dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Azure Blue Dye

Description: A labor-saving pink dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Metallic Pink Dye

Plural: pots of metallic ruby red dye
Description: A labor-saving red dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Metallic Ruby Red Dye

Singular: pot of metallic cobalt green dye
Plural: pots of metallic cobalt green dye
Description: A labor-saving green dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Metallic Cobalt Green Dye

Singular: pot of metallic dark blue dye
Plural: pots of metallic dark blue dye
Description: A labor-saving blue dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Metallic Dark Blue Dye

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Stargazers</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Stargazers Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Hey, Cid!</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Hey, Cid! Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>The Airship</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: The Airship Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Echoes in the Distance</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Echoes in the Distance Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Close in the Distance (Instrumental)</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Close in the Distance (Instrumental) Orchestrion Roll

Description: A labor-saving red dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.
Name: Carmine Red Dye

Singular: high mobility vacuum suit identification key
Plural: high mobility vacuum suit identification keys
Description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your high mobility vacuum suit will magically bring the machine to life.
Name: High Mobility Vacuum Suit Identification Key

Description: Packed to the brim with materials for stellar missions.
Name: Cosmic Container

Singular: crate of interior hub light components
Plural: crates of interior hub light components
Name: Interior Hub Light Components

Singular: bottle of cosmotized worker's nutrient mixture
Plural: bottles of cosmotized worker's nutrient mixture
Name: Cosmotized Worker's Nutrient Mixture

Singular: jar of survey craftsman's cunning brew
Plural: jars of survey craftsman's cunning brew
Name: Survey Craftsman's Cunning Brew

Plural: jars of survey craftsman's competence brew
Name: Survey Craftsman's Competence Brew

Singular: jar of survey craftsman's command brew
Plural: jars of survey craftsman's command brew
Name: Survey Craftsman's Command Brew

Singular: serving of launch party scrambled eggs
Plural: servings of launch party scrambled eggs
Name: Launch Party Scrambled Eggs

Singular: serving of launch party boiled fish head
Plural: servings of launch party boiled fish head
Name: Launch Party Boiled Fish Head

Singular: chunk of lunar yellow copper ore
Plural: chunks of lunar yellow copper ore
Name: Lunar Yellow Copper Ore

Description: An interstellar travel-ready seat with a futuristic─yet still appropriately leporine─design.
Name: Cosmochair

Description: This furnishing is designed to minimize the possibility of spills in low-gravity environments. Unfortunately, technology capable of compensating entirely for Loporrit error remains far in the future.
Name: Cosmotable

Description: An energy-efficient lighting appliance with a design reminiscent of a solar system.
Name: Cosmolamp

Description: Though this piece of illuminating infrastructure has been specially designed to function in the icy vacuum of space, it is still not rated for licking.
Name: Stellar Lamppost

Description:
A tool chest containing a cosmic prototype.

Required level: 10. IL: 10. Primary tool type determined by current class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Cosmic Prototype Coffer
